lines.speaker: c4ssi4n
lines.text: No and even if I did have one I wouldn't give it to you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already have one. I was just letting you know that having a lockpick helps when getting into these coffins. You appear to be struggling.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just letting you know that having a lockpick helps when getting into these coffins. You appear to be struggling.

lines.speaker: c4ssi4n
lines.text: Wait, are you serious? The last adventurer I spoke to down here told me that lockpicks don't help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I'm serious. Also that outfit you're wearing doesn't help you get more loot from these coffins either.

lines.speaker: c4ssi4n
lines.text: They lied about that too? I feel like a fool!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: At least you look cool dressed like that though.

lines.speaker: c4ssi4n
lines.text: Who cares about that? If it doesn't work then I should just wear the full graceful outfit since that would be much more efficient.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Each to their own I suppose.
